summary: Iteration 253 — Outbound Delivery Guard testing complete. All 14 features verified. EmailPreviewDialog shows mandatory checkbox 'Ho verificato destinatari, oggetto e allegati', send button disabled until checked, button text 'Conferma e Invia' with ShieldCheck icon, warnings for no attachment/recipient. SdiPreviewDialog shows validation checks (Cliente, Numero fattura, Totale, IVA, Stato, P.IVA/CF, Codice SDI/PEC), mandatory checkbox, blockers warning, send button disabled until confirmed. Both dialogs work from InvoiceEditorPage and InvoicesPage. SAFE_MODE removed from backend/.env.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warnings about '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' in InvoiceEditorPage - likely from React dev tools instrumentation, not a functional issue
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice 1/2026 for Condominio Residence Park (122.00 EUR)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Outbound Delivery Guard implemented. EmailPreviewDialog and SdiPreviewDialog both require mandatory checkbox confirmation before send. Demo mode simulates email/SDI sends. Backend audit logging via outbound_audit.py logs to 'outbound_audit_log' collection.

email_preview_dialog.send_button_disabled_before_checkbox: PASS - Send button disabled until checkbox checked
email_preview_dialog.send_button_text: PASS - Button text 'Conferma e Invia' with ShieldCheck icon
email_preview_dialog.send_button_enabled_after_checkbox: PASS - Send button enabled after checkbox checked
email_preview_dialog.warning_no_attachment: PASS - data-testid=email-warn-no-attach shows when no attachment
email_preview_dialog.warning_no_recipient: PASS - data-testid=email-warn-no-dest shows when no recipient

sdi_preview_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - data-testid=sdi-preview-dialog opens on btn-send-sdi click
sdi_preview_dialog.send_button_disabled_before_checkbox: PASS - Send button disabled until checkbox checked
sdi_preview_dialog.send_button_text: PASS - Button text 'Conferma e Invia a SDI'
sdi_preview_dialog.send_button_enabled_after_checkbox: PASS - Send button enabled after checkbox checked
sdi_preview_dialog.blockers_warning: PASS - data-testid=sdi-warn-blockers shows when validation fails

features_verified: 1. EmailPreviewDialog: Shows checkbox 'Ho verificato destinatari, oggetto e allegati' (data-testid=email-confirm-checkbox)
2. EmailPreviewDialog: Send button is DISABLED until checkbox is checked
3. EmailPreviewDialog: Send button text changed to 'Conferma e Invia' with ShieldCheck icon
4. EmailPreviewDialog: Warning shown when no attachment (data-testid=email-warn-no-attach)
5. EmailPreviewDialog: Warning shown when no recipient (data-testid=email-warn-no-dest)
6. SdiPreviewDialog: Opens when clicking 'Invia SDI' on invoice editor (data-testid=btn-send-sdi)
7. SdiPreviewDialog: Shows validation checks (client, invoice number, total, P.IVA/CF, Codice SDI/PEC)
8. SdiPreviewDialog: Checkbox 'Ho verificato i dati e confermo l'invio a SDI' required before send
9. SdiPreviewDialog: Send button disabled until confirmed
10. InvoicesPage: SDI send goes through SdiPreviewDialog (not direct confirm dialog)
11. Backend: outbound_audit_log service exists for audit logging
12. Backend: outbound_audit.py logs email/SDI sends with action_type, recipient, status
13. All existing email flows still work (tested via InvoiceEditorPage)
14. SAFE_MODE removed from .env (guard pattern replaces it)
